model_output_raw_text: {"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"OPTIMIZER = \"adamw\"","old":"OPTIMIZER = \"adam\"","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-4","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 64","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Use AdamW with a higher learning rate and moderately stronger weight decay, plus a larger batch size to improve quality within the fixed-step budget.","secondary_modes":["topk","micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = True","new":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"summaries","rationale":"The cosine schedule hurt validation loss in this fixed-step regime; disabling it restores constant-LR training that performed better.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 12","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase early feature capacity with a small width bump to reduce underfitting within the fixed 256-step budget while keeping the model compact.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 48","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 64","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase classifier head capacity modestly to better use stronger convolutional features without adding much complexity.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 64","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 48","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"The larger head regressed; revert to the simpler classifier width that previously gave the better validated loss.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Slightly reduce the learning rate to improve optimization stability for the wider feature extractor under a short fixed-step budget.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Revert to the previously better learning rate after the lower value degraded validation loss.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"With a fixed step budget, a larger batch exposes more unique examples and can improve validation loss if optimization remains stable.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.2e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Slightly increase learning rate to better match the larger batch regime and potentially improve progress per update under fixed steps.","secondary_modes":["micro","indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.2e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Revert to the better-performing learning rate after the higher value worsened validation loss.","secondary_modes":["micro","indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 3e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"With the larger batch already improving optimization, slightly reducing weight decay may lower underfitting and improve validation loss within the same step budget.","secondary_modes":["indexing","topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 3e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Restore the stronger regularization because lowering weight decay caused a regression.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 512","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Test a larger batch to further increase sample coverage within the fixed 256-step budget.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.1e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"After the large batch-size gain, test a mild learning-rate increase to improve update efficiency while staying close to the proven stable setting.","secondary_modes":["micro","indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 512","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 1024","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Continue scaling batch size under fixed-step evaluation to increase total sample throughput and test whether the observed gains from larger batches continue.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.2e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"With batch size at 1024, test a small additional learning-rate increase to improve convergence speed per step.","secondary_modes":["micro","indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.999)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.98)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Use a lower second-moment beta to make AdamW more responsive in the high-batch, short-horizon regime.","secondary_modes":["topk","micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.98)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.999)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Revert beta2 to the previous value since the lower beta caused a clear regression.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.2e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.3e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Final step explores a small additional learning-rate increase in the now high-throughput regime to potentially gain a bit more per-update progress.","secondary_modes":["micro","indexing"]}
